rationale: Review 2's primary fix suggestion ("replace by `exact fiberHomeomorph_one`/`fiberHomeomorph_mul`") is circular: those lemmas are proved at lines 55 and 62 by calling `(fiberHomeomorphMonoidHom p b).map_mul`/`.map_one`, so they cannot be used inside the definition of `fiberHomeomorphMonoidHom` itself. Acting on Review 2 would either force a major reordering or leave the author stuck. Review 1 avoids this by pointing to lower-level pointwise API, and it additionally flags the fragile `Subtype.ext rfl` proofs in the `MulAction` instance (lines 89-91) that Review 2 misses entirely.
